requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容排放——RBS RS标准（基于CISPR）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容排放——RBS RS標準（基於CISPR）

summary.en: Rwanda Bureau of Standards (RBS) adopts RS standards based on IEC and CISPR international standards for electromagnetic emissions from information technology equipment, radio devices, and IoT devices. Radiated and conducted emissions must comply with the applicable RS standard limits (mirroring CISPR 32 / CISPR 22 for IT and multimedia equipment). Test reports from accredited laboratories are required as part of the RURA type approval technical file. Radio frequency channel plans and 5 GHz Wi-Fi usage are subject to RURA spectrum management: 5 GHz operation above 5.15–5.35 GHz indoors is restricted; outdoor use requires additional RURA authorisation.
summary.zh: 卢旺达标准局（RBS）采用基于IEC和CISPR国际标准的RS标准，适用于信息技术设备、无线设备和物联网设备的电磁排放。辐射和传导排放须符合适用的RS标准限值（参照CISPR 32 / CISPR 22适用于IT和多媒体设备）。来自认可实验室的测试报告须作为RURA型式批准技术档案的组成部分提交。无线电频率信道规划和5 GHz Wi-Fi使用受RURA频谱管理约束：5.15–5.35 GHz以上的5 GHz室内使用受限，室外使用须获得RURA额外授权。
summary.zht: 盧旺達標準局（RBS）採用基於IEC和CISPR國際標準的RS標準，適用於資訊科技設備、無線設備和物聯網裝置的電磁排放。輻射和傳導排放須符合適用的RS標準限值（參照CISPR 32 / CISPR 22適用於IT和多媒體設備）。來自認可實驗室的測試報告須作為RURA型式批准技術檔案的組成部分提交。無線電頻率信道規劃和5 GHz Wi-Fi使用受RURA頻譜管理約束：5.15–5.35 GHz以上的5 GHz室內使用受限，室外使用須獲得RURA額外授權。

standards_or_laws: RBS RS standards (IEC/CISPR-based EMC emissions, Rwanda)
RURA Radio Frequency Spectrum Management Regulations (Rwanda)
CISPR 32 / CISPR 22 (adopted by reference via RBS RS)

summary.en: GB 9254 (radiated and conducted emissions for IT equipment, equivalent to CISPR 22/32) and GB 17743 (radio disturbance limits for household equipment, equivalent to CISPR 14-1) apply in China. SRRC type approval covers radio frequency spectrum usage. Chinese GB emissions test reports are not automatically accepted by RBS or RURA; new tests against applicable RS/CISPR limits or re-use under mutual recognition (not yet established with Rwanda) may be required.
summary.zh: GB 9254（IT设备辐射和传导排放，等效CISPR 22/32）及GB 17743（家用设备无线电干扰限值，等效CISPR 14-1）在中国适用。SRRC型式批准涵盖无线电频率频谱使用。中国GB排放测试报告不被RBS或RURA自动认可；可能需要依据适用RS/CISPR限值进行新的测试，或通过互认（尚未与卢旺达建立）使用现有报告。
summary.zht: GB 9254（IT設備輻射和傳導排放，等效CISPR 22/32）及GB 17743（家用設備無線電干擾限值，等效CISPR 14-1）在中國適用。SRRC型式批准涵蓋無線電頻率頻譜使用。中國GB排放測試報告不被RBS或RURA自動認可；可能需要依據適用RS/CISPR限值進行新的測試，或通過互認（尚未與盧旺達建立）使用現有報告。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of IT equipment (China)
GB 17743 — Radio disturbance limits and measurement methods for household electrical appliances (China)
MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval covering spectrum usage (China)

gap.en: RBS RS emission standards must be met and documented via test reports from accredited laboratories as part of the RURA type approval dossier. Chinese GB emission test reports are not automatically accepted; re-testing or specific mutual-recognition arrangements (not currently in place with Rwanda) may be required. The 5 GHz band above 5.15–5.35 GHz is restricted to indoor use; outdoor 5 GHz requires additional RURA authorisation.
gap.zh: 须满足RBS RS排放标准，并通过来自认可实验室的测试报告进行证明，作为RURA型式批准档案的组成部分。中国GB排放测试报告不被自动接受，可能需要重新测试或特定互认安排（目前尚未与卢旺达建立）。5.15–5.35 GHz以上的5 GHz频段限室内使用；室外5 GHz使用须获得RURA额外授权。
gap.zht: 須滿足RBS RS排放標準，並通過來自認可實驗室的測試報告進行證明，作為RURA型式批准檔案的組成部分。中國GB排放測試報告不被自動接受，可能需要重新測試或特定互認安排（目前尚未與盧旺達建立）。5.15–5.35 GHz以上的5 GHz頻段限室內使用；室外5 GHz使用須獲得RURA額外授權。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC emission compliance against RBS RS (CISPR-based) standards is required as part of the RURA type approval technical file. Chinese GB emission test reports are not automatically recognised by RURA or RBS. The 5 GHz Wi-Fi band is subject to RURA indoor-only restrictions above 5.15–5.35 GHz; outdoor 5 GHz deployment requires separate authorisation. Verify current RURA spectrum assignments and RBS applicable RS standards before submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据RBS RS（基于CISPR）标准的电磁兼容排放合规须作为RURA型式批准技术档案的一部分提交。中国GB排放测试报告不被RURA或RBS自动认可。5 GHz Wi-Fi频段在5.15–5.35 GHz以上受RURA室内限用限制；室外5 GHz部署须单独授权。提交前请核验现行RURA频谱分配及RBS适用RS标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據RBS RS（基於CISPR）標準的電磁相容排放合規須作為RURA型式批准技術檔案的一部分提交。中國GB排放測試報告不被RURA或RBS自動認可。5 GHz Wi-Fi頻段在5.15–5.35 GHz以上受RURA室內限用限制；室外5 GHz部署須單獨授權。提交前請核驗現行RURA頻譜分配及RBS適用RS標準。

requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容抗扰度——RBS RS标准（基于IEC 61000）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容抗擾度——RBS RS標準（基於IEC 61000）

summary.en: Rwanda Bureau of Standards (RBS) RS standards adopt IEC 61000-series immunity requirements for electronic and ICT equipment sold in Rwanda. Devices must demonstrate adequate immunity to electrostatic discharge (ESD), radiated electromagnetic fields, electrical fast transients, surges, and conducted disturbances. Immunity test reports from accredited laboratories must be included in the technical file submitted for RURA type approval. Rwanda's tropical climate and developing power grid environment may present elevated surge and transient conditions that heighten practical importance of immunity compliance.
summary.zh: 卢旺达标准局（RBS）RS标准采用IEC 61000系列抗扰度要求，适用于在卢旺达销售的电子及ICT设备。设备须证明对静电放电（ESD）、辐射电磁场、电气快速瞬变、浪涌和传导干扰具备充分的抗扰度。来自认可实验室的抗扰度测试报告须纳入提交RURA型式批准的技术档案中。卢旺达热带气候及发展中电网环境可能呈现较高浪涌和瞬变条件，使抗扰度合规的实际重要性更为突出。
summary.zht: 盧旺達標準局（RBS）RS標準採用IEC 61000系列抗擾度要求，適用於在盧旺達銷售的電子及ICT設備。設備須證明對靜電放電（ESD）、輻射電磁場、電氣快速瞬變、浪湧和傳導干擾具備充分的抗擾度。來自認可實驗室的抗擾度測試報告須納入提交RURA型式批准的技術檔案中。盧旺達熱帶氣候及發展中電網環境可能呈現較高浪湧和瞬變條件，使抗擾度合規的實際重要性更為突出。

standards_or_laws: RBS RS standards (IEC 61000-series EMC immunity, Rwanda)

summary.en: GB/T 17618 and related GB/T standards (equivalent to IEC 61000-4 series) cover immunity for IT equipment in China. Chinese GB/T immunity test reports may share the same underlying IEC 61000-4 test methodology, but are not automatically recognised by RBS or RURA. Rwanda's tropical and grid conditions may require assessment of test-level adequacy beyond what was tested for the Chinese market.
summary.zh: GB/T 17618及相关GB/T标准（等效IEC 61000-4系列）涵盖中国IT设备的抗扰度要求。中国GB/T抗扰度测试报告可能采用相同的IEC 61000-4底层测试方法，但不被RBS或RURA自动认可。卢旺达的热带气候及电网条件可能需要评估测试级别是否足以应对超出中国市场测试范围的情况。
summary.zht: GB/T 17618及相關GB/T標準（等效IEC 61000-4系列）涵蓋中國IT設備的抗擾度要求。中國GB/T抗擾度測試報告可能採用相同的IEC 61000-4底層測試方法，但不被RBS或RURA自動認可。盧旺達的熱帶氣候及電網條件可能需要評估測試級別是否足以應對超出中國市場測試範圍的情況。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17618 — Limits and methods of measurement of immunity for IT equipment (China)
GB/T 17626 series — IEC 61000-4 equivalent immunity standards (China)

gap.en: Immunity test reports must be provided against applicable RBS RS / IEC 61000-4 series requirements as part of the RURA type approval dossier. Chinese GB/T immunity test reports are not automatically recognised. Test levels appropriate for Rwanda's tropical climate and developing power-grid environment should be considered. Verify with RBS which specific RS immunity standards are currently applicable before initiating testing.
gap.zh: 须依据适用的RBS RS / IEC 61000-4系列要求提供抗扰度测试报告，作为RURA型式批准档案的一部分。中国GB/T抗扰度测试报告不被自动认可。应考虑适合卢旺达热带气候及发展中电网环境的测试级别。在开始测试前，请与RBS核实当前适用的具体RS抗扰度标准。
gap.zht: 須依據適用的RBS RS / IEC 61000-4系列要求提供抗擾度測試報告，作為RURA型式批准檔案的一部分。中國GB/T抗擾度測試報告不被自動認可。應考慮適合盧旺達熱帶氣候及發展中電網環境的測試級別。在開始測試前，請與RBS核實當前適用的具體RS抗擾度標準。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC immunity compliance against RBS RS (IEC 61000-4-based) standards is required as part of the RURA type approval technical file. Chinese GB/T immunity reports are not automatically recognised by RURA or RBS. Rwanda's tropical climate and grid conditions may affect applicable test severity levels. Confirm current applicable RS standards with RBS before testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据RBS RS（基于IEC 61000-4）标准的电磁兼容抗扰度合规须作为RURA型式批准技术档案的一部分提交。中国GB/T抗扰度报告不被RURA或RBS自动认可。卢旺达的热带气候及电网条件可能影响适用的测试严酷度级别。测试前请与RBS确认当前适用的RS标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據RBS RS（基於IEC 61000-4）標準的電磁相容抗擾度合規須作為RURA型式批准技術檔案的一部分提交。中國GB/T抗擾度報告不被RURA或RBS自動認可。盧旺達的熱帶氣候及電網條件可能影響適用的測試嚴酷度級別。測試前請與RBS確認當前適用的RS標準。
